transcript: A project is a temporary endeavor undertaken to create a unique product service or result. Every project has a definite beginning and end. Projects are different from operations which are ongoing and repetitive. The key characteristics of a project include being temporary having a unique deliverable and being progressively elaborated. Progressive elaboration means that the project plan becomes more detailed as more information becomes available. Projects can range from building a bridge to developing a software application to organizing a conference. The project management institute PMI defines project management as the application of knowledge skills tools and techniques to project activities to meet project requirements.
